title: Junior Investment Banker at SEBI Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Junior Investment Banker at SEBI Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
SEBI Consulting Pvt Ltd is actively seeking a talented and motivated Investment Banker to join our dynamic team in Jabalpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About SEBI Consulting Pvt Ltd:
SEBI Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SEBI Consulting Pvt Ltd!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
